LinguisticUnit.docstring:
Universal data structure for linguistic units extracted from text.
    Ensures consistency across different backends and processing strategies.

length.docstring: Get the length of this unit in characters.

LinguisticContext.docstring:
Context object that flows through linguistic processing chains.
    Contains the original text, extracted units, and processing metadata.
    
    Also serves as execution context for context-aware registry methods.
    Inherits common properties from BaseContext for cross-subsystem standardization.

add_unit.docstring: Add a linguistic unit to the context.

get_units_by_type.docstring: Get all units of a specific type.

mark_processed.docstring: Mark that this context has been processed by a specific processor.

has_been_processed_by.docstring: Check if this context has been processed by a specific processor.
